description: Structured JSON newsletter system with templates, CLI skill for creation, draft/approval workflow, and rich content rendering including markdown support, versioning, and preview routes.

userStories.title: Newsletter JSON Schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a documented JSON schema for newsletter content so all newsletters have consistent structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/newsletter-schema.md documenting the JSON structure
Schema supports block types: header, paragraph, list, image, video, code, blockquote, callout, expandable, tabs, snippet
Each block has type, content, and optional style properties
Root schema: id, title, slug, template, status (draft|approved|published), author, version, publishedAt, blocks[]

userStories.title: Template - Weekly Update
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want a Weekly Update template for consistent weekly newsletters.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes: hero header, intro paragraph, 3-5 highlight sections, bullet lists, closing CTA
Template has placeholder content showing expected structure
JSON validates against Zod schema (add test)

userStories.title: Template - Deep Dive
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want a Deep Dive template for in-depth technical content.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes: title, intro, multiple h2/h3 sections, code snippets, images, blockquotes, conclusion
Supports expandable sections for long content

userStories.title: Template - News Digest
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want a News Digest template for curating news items.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes: intro, 5-7 news item cards with link snippets, brief commentary, category tags
Each news item has title, source, summary, link

userStories.title: Template - Behind-the-Scenes
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want a Behind-the-Scenes template for informal updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes: casual intro, image gallery section, story blocks, personal notes callout

userStories.title: Template - Special Announcement
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want a Special Announcement template for important news.
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes: bold hero header, announcement body, key details list, CTA buttons, FAQ expandable
High-impact visual styling hints in style properties

userStories.title: Newsletter Renderer Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want newsletters to render beautifully from JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders all block types via sub-components in src/components/newsletter/blocks/
Create block components: header-block.tsx, paragraph-block.tsx, list-block.tsx, image-block.tsx
Paragraph block renders markdown using react-markdown

userStories.title: Code Block with Syntax Highlighting
userStories.description: As a user, I want code snippets with syntax highlighting.
acceptanceCriteria: Supports languages: javascript, typescript, python, bash, json, tsx
Copy button on each code block

userStories.title: Link Snippet Block
userStories.description: As a user, I want link snippets with rich previews.
acceptanceCriteria: Displays: title, description, favicon, domain, optional image
Snippet data stored in JSON (not fetched at runtime)

userStories.title: Expandable Section Block
userStories.description: As a user, I want expandable sections for long content.
acceptanceCriteria: Click to expand/collapse with smooth CSS transition
Shows title and preview when collapsed
Chevron indicator rotates on state change

userStories.title: Callout Block
userStories.description: As a user, I want callout boxes for important information.

userStories.title: Video and Blockquote Blocks
userStories.description: As a user, I want video embeds and styled blockquotes.
acceptanceCriteria: Blockquote has left border accent, italic styling, optional attribution

userStories.title: Tabs Block
userStories.description: As a user, I want tabbed content sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Tab headers with active state indicator
Each tab can contain any block type

userStories.title: Copy Article Button
userStories.description: As a user, I want to copy the entire article with one click.
acceptanceCriteria: Add copy button component in top-right area of article
Button copies article content as formatted plain text (not JSON)
Position sticky so accessible while scrolling

userStories.title: Draft Storage Directory
userStories.description: As a developer, I need draft newsletters stored as tracked files.
acceptanceCriteria: Add README.md in content/newsletters/ explaining structure

userStories.title: Newsletter Database Model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a database model for published newsletters.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: id, title, slug (unique), template, content (Json), author, status, version (Int), publishedAt, createdAt, updatedAt

userStories.title: Newsletter Versioning
userStories.description: As a developer, I need version history for newsletters.
acceptanceCriteria: Add NewsletterVersion model to Prisma schema
Fields: id, newsletterId (relation), version (Int), content (Json), createdAt
On publish, create version record with current content
Version increments on each publish of same slug

userStories.title: Publish Newsletter Script
userStories.description: As a developer, I need approved newsletters to publish to database.
acceptanceCriteria: Script reads all files in content/newsletters/drafts/
For files with status approved: insert/update Newsletter, create version record, set status published, move to published/
Script runs without errors on empty drafts folder

userStories.title: Newsletter Preview Route
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want to preview draft newsletters before publishing.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows 'PREVIEW - NOT PUBLISHED' banner at top

userStories.title: Newsletter List Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to browse published newsletters.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch from Newsletter table where status = published
Display cards: title, date, template badge, version number

userStories.title: Newsletter Detail Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view a published newsletter with full content.
acceptanceCriteria: Update /exclusive/[slug] to fetch newsletter by slug from database
Show version and publish date in header

userStories.title: /newsletter Skill - Create Flow
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want a CLI skill that interviews me to create newsletters.
acceptanceCriteria: Skill asks: template choice, title, slug, author
Interview adapts questions based on template chosen

userStories.title: /newsletter Skill - Approve Command
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want to approve newsletters via CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Sets status: approved in draft JSON
Confirms: Newsletter 'title' approved. Run npm run publish:newsletters to deploy.
Error message if slug not found in drafts/

userStories.title: /newsletter Skill - List Command
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want to list all draft newsletters.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows table: slug, title, template, status, version
Indicates which are ready for approval

userStories.title: /newsletter Skill - Preview Command
userStories.description: As a content creator, I want to preview drafts before approving.
acceptanceCriteria: Opens http://localhost:7000/preview/{slug} in browser if browser tools available
Otherwise displays formatted summary in terminal

userStories.title: CI Newsletter Publish Integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want approved newsletters to publish on deploy.
acceptanceCriteria: Run npm run publish:newsletters after build
Only triggers when content/newsletters/ files change

nonGoals: No WYSIWYG browser editor (CLI skill is authoring interface)
No scheduled publishing (immediate on approval + deploy)
No comments or reactions on newsletters
